description: Court record involving Yehuda b. Nissim al-Tūnisī (cf. T-S NS 226.98 (PGPID 24425)) and Yosef b. Abū l-Bishr known as Ibn al-[...]. The actual context is not clear, due to the bad preservation of the text. The date is partially preserved: [1]44[.] Seleucid = 1128–38 CE. On verso there is a mirror image imprint of another legal document involving a woman and her husband Shela. AA/ASE
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
